fewShots.question: What do customers typically buy with Shoes 12?
fewShots.query:
-- DB: Gold_Consume
SELECT
  pa.rhs_item_id,
  pa.lift,
  pa.confidence_lhs_to_rhs AS confidence,
  pa.pair_cnt
FROM [Gold_Consume].[dbo].[fact_product_affinity_topk] AS pa
WHERE pa.lhs_item_id = 'Shoes 12'
ORDER BY
  pa.lift DESC,
  pa.confidence_lhs_to_rhs DESC,
  pa.pair_cnt DESC;
